feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Looking for 'Excise Duty Condition' configuration steps in Sales Order without IS-OIL Setting?
entry.content:
Hi All

I have searched so much in SAP community for Excise Duty Condition value determination without IS-OIL Component  / without TDP setting.

I Request you to please help to provide the Standard SAP configuration to achieve to determine the Excise Duty value determination in SAP Sales order.

Thanks & Regards

SJ

entry.title: QA33 NO LAYOUTS FOUND
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When I try to run the QA33 program a custom layout comes automatically and I get an error message called no layouts found. 

I know there is no such a layout among my layouts, may it come from custom code, but I want to use a standard layout here all the time to charm away this problem. 

Do you have any idea about how can I delete the layout pointed out below from all users (And how can I be sure it will not come back)? 

Waiting for your kind responses.

entry.title: where to check administrative data - Account Group in BP - customer master - s4 hana 2023
entry.content: usually i get the account group of a customer from Extras - administrative data - Account Group or from KNA1 table. but now i want to change the account group. but couldn't able to view account group under extras any other guidelines for this.

entry.title: Modify Ship-to-party's address during sales order change
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have got a requirement where to modify ship-to-party's address in sales order header.

During order creation or change, user can change the address manually. This has to be verified using an external API call and correct address has to be updated.

Can anyone provide any user exits or any modification option at code level to achieve this.

Thanks

SAP ERP SD (Sales and Distribution) #Enhancement #user exits #badi

entry.title: down payment FAZ more than 2 VAT condition
entry.content:
Hi all, in short words:

 we use at company in Slovakia the standard Downpayment prozess, billing type FAZ.

 at Slovakia its legal requirement that logist costs has different VAT. so we have 2 VAT Condition e.g Material01  price 200 eurwith vat 20% and logistic cost 10 eur 15%

 Material 200 eur / 40 Eur VAT,  Logistic Costs 10 Eur / 1,5 Eur VAT

 at FAZ there is only one Condition AZWR, so its only 1 VAT code using, the last one ... which comes to a wrong value ... and beside this the layout of the downpayment invoice is wrong, becuase of wroing VAT values.

 Do anyone know this situation and have maybe a solution for this?

 We really need very urgent help.  thx a lot bye Mike

entry.title: Which settings enables the Tax code in conditions ?
entry.content:
Dear SD/FI experts,

I have checked the community threads and found the answer but it did not help when i tried in the system

I am using ECC and I already know that that tax code appears for MWST condition type in the sales order conditions screen as long as i maintain the same percentage for MWST (condition category D 'tax' in V/06) in trx VK11 and in trx FTXP (under tax code and account key combination)

Now i see that tax code A0 also appears for variant condition type VA00 which is not condition category D (tax) and there is no tax code field in VK11 for VA00 either, and there is nothing against the account key of VA00 (from pricing procedure) in trx FTXP so where is it pulling the tax code from for VA00 ??

Is it from trx OBCL where V0 and A0 are by default maintained against the company code ??

If yes for trx OBCL then why is it not appearing for PR00 then ??

What are the settings which will disable or enable the tax code from appearing in conditions

Best, Ahmed

entry.title: Document is picking different number Range than mestioned in document type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have an urgent requirement to change number ranges for sales order, delivery billing document and odn for new financial year.

When i checked the number range in the document type it shows 01, but the document is picking 42 number range in vn01, same goes for the delivery and billing document number range.

this is happening for delivery and billing documents aswell. please share your views on this.

Regards,

Siva

entry.title: The credit check is not preformed for the sales scheduling agreement
entry.content:
We have configured the credit check for Sales order - scope item BD9. However when we create a scheduling agreement the credit check status is 'Not Performed'. How do we setup the credit check for scope item 3NR?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How is tax code determined in Sales Order when Condition Type has no access sequence?
entry.content:
Hello 

I am from Korea. pls consider my poor english.

It is my first question here. 

I have been working on SD module for a year.

I have just learnt the process of tax code determination while creating Sales Order.

It is determined by Pricing Procedure ,Condition Type, Access Sequence and Condition Table.... etc

But I have recently found a case where tax code is not input by that process.

Although a condition type (MWR1) has no access code, after pricing procedure it gets tax code

see below screenshots..

 

1. In a Sales Order

 

2. Condition Type MWR1 

3. Pricing Procedure

 

 

Actually there is no problem in the SAP system running.

It is just from my curiosity and for my learning.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Overall delivery status issue
entry.content:
In the 'List Sales Order' app, I want to know the meaning of 'Completed' in the overall status.

I think it means the delivery process has been completed.

But why, when I choose 'Completed,' can I still see sales orders that haven't completed picking yet?

Can anyone give me an idea of why 'Completed' is chosen for the overall delivery status?

Sales order 2922 shows delivery fully completed

Sales order 2922 delivery is not done

entry.title: Is there an OData or class to which I can add a print queue (item)?
entry.content:
I would like to deploy my own application to a customizing tenant and trigger something to accumulate it as an item in the print queue.
Sorry to be so abstract, but please let me know if the above is feasible.

If it is feasible, please let me know what OData and standard classes (methods) can be used.

I am thinking that this API may be available.
API_CLOUD_PRINT_PULL_SRV


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: App for Reprinting SP20 Label
entry.content:
1. Is there any app for this activity which is not part of SAP_CA_BC_OC_PC..
  2. Is there a way we restrict editing but allow re-printing with SAP_CA_BC_OC_PC .

The SAP_CA_BC_OC_PC here means the app Manage Output items.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Change schedule lines after sales order has been partial delivery, but condition also change
entry.content:
Hi All,

The user needs to split the schedule lines after the sales order has been delivered and an invoice is issued.

But now there is a problem, When the operation is different, the conditions will change.

1. Change original line > press Enter  > Add new line

2. Change original line and Add new line > press Enter

The conditions for invoices that have been issued are grayed out. but when user follows step 1, the conditions will be changed.

Does anyone know why this is happening?

Sorry, my native language is not English. If there is any unclear explanation, please ask again, thanks.

entry.title: RF Gun Error - Quant not consistent with other transfer order data
entry.content:
LE (Logistics Execution) MM (Materials Management) SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Hello SAP Experts,
This is regarding WM consignment stocks in RF Transaction

The Stock Transfer from Non SU Managed Storage Type to SU Managed St Type in RF Handheld (RF gun) is NOT working for WM consignment stocks.

Error Message appears as below while transferring the consignment stock from Non SU Managed St Type to SU Managed St Type,
Quant 000000XXXX not consistent with other transfer order data
Message No. L3 018

Please check and advise how to resolve the error message No. L3 018.

Best Regards,
Kumar Subramaniam

entry.title: Mapping Text ID to Forms - Report, App, CDS View
entry.content:
Dear SAP community, 

Is there an app, report or CDS View available to see the mapping of the Text ID of Header and Item to the Forms?

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: Profit center when creating returns order for another plant
entry.content:
A customer returns goods to another plant than from where it was bought.

During Customer Returns (CBAR) creation we are changing the line-item plant from X to Y. They expect to see the profitability segment data (plant and profit centre) to be updated/redetermined but this is not happening.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Upper limit for SKTO cash discount at material per unit level in billing document
entry.content:
We are using SKTO condition type to calculate the cash discount from the payment terms in the customer master record. However, we got a requirement to limit the calculated cash discount value (for example to 10 USD) for every unit of the material. Below is the illustration:

 

Item 1 - Material XYZ - Qty 10 - Per unit price is 100 USD - Cash discount percentage is 6%
So calculated cash discount value per unit is 6 USD and total cash discount for the SO line item 1 is 60 USD.

Item 2 - Material ABC - Qty 10 - Per unit price is 200 USD - Cash discount percentage is 6%
So calculated cash discount per unit is USD 12. But I want to limit this to 10 USD.
So the new cash discount per unit is USD 10 and total cash discount for the SO line item 2 is USD 100.

To achieve this, we tried limiting the condition values in OBV2 (Define upper/lower limits for conditions).
However, this is only restricting the value given in the condition records (VK11) for this condition type.

We also tried the "Maximum Condition value" in VK11 under "Limits for Pricing" section of the condition record. But this amount is not calculated per unit rather is calculated as the total condition value combined for all the sales orders posted against the customer. This is not what we want.

We also tried the "upper limit" value under the "amounts" section of the condition record in VK11, but this too just limits the manual amount given in the sales order against the condition type but not the calculated value.

Is there a way in the standard pricing to limit the calculated value per unit of the item?

Also, if SKTO doesn't has that functionality (as the percentage is taken directly from the payment terms but not the condition record), we are OK to create a new custom condition type for cash discount.

Please help.

entry.title: For reasons of cost management, item 000010 cannot be deletedMessage no. V1128
entry.content:
HI Expert

Fire Urgent Please

I have cancelled my Sale Invoice and PGI ,then i am come back my Sales Order VA02 but system not allowed me to delete the line item on Sales Order. The system is response currently restricting deletion of the line item in the Sales Order

When I am deleting Line item in sale order its giving a message like this "For reasons of cost management, item 000010 cannot be deleted
Message no. V1128

Maintained MRP1 MRP Type ND/PD Both and MRP3, Strategy Group 10/20
Sales Order Type Domestic Dealer Sales

Can anyone explain me about this and can give me solution how to delete this item please??

Thanks 

M.G Rabbani

entry.title: Cross-Selling without Structure HgLevlItm
entry.content:
We want to use cross-selling to add product B when product A is entered in an order (VA01).

This works fine but it adds B as a sub-item with Higher-Level Item = 10.

 

We don't want this - it should be a normal position 10 with no Higher-Level Item. Is there any way to customize this?

Unfortunately, when we use an Enhancement Point (ES_SAPFV45P SAPFV45P Static Enhancement Point/Section \PR:SAPFV45P\EX:VBAP_FUELLEN_10\EI) to clear UEPOS ...

IF vbap-uepvw = 'F'. " Cross-Selling
  CLEAR vbap-uepos. " Don't add cross-selling as sub-positions
ENDIF.

...we lose the quantity (3 was entered):

entry.title: No se determina la cuenta de diferencial para el impuesto (SD)
entry.content:
Somos un grupo de mas de 15 sociedad en varios países. Una de estas está presentando un error a la hora de contabilizar notas de crédito con el siguiente escenario:

  • Moneda USD
  • Material con IVA
  • El tipo de cambio de la nota de crédito es diferente al de la factura asociada

El error que se muestra es el siguiente:

No definida determ. de ctas. para Diferencias de cotización impuestos con claves   en plan de ctas. PILG

Nº mensaje: F5611

Diagnóstico

Al no estar definida la determinación de cuentas para Diferencias de cotización impuestos con las claves   en el plan de cuentas PILG, no se podrá Crear una contabilización automática.

Actividades en el sistema

No se puede contabilizar el documento.

Procedimiento

Dependiendo de la clase de tratamiento, podrá Retener el documento y contabilizarlo posteriormente. Si no fuera posible y no se pudiera subsanar el error en el Customizing a corto plazo, deberá abandonar el tratamiento y volver a registrar el documento más adelante.

El mensaje indica como solución configurar la OBYY, sin embargo, no se considera una solución ya que esta configuración afectaría las demás sociedades, además el resto de sociedades no tienen este problema y el mismo escenario se ejecuta a diario.

Como parte de las pruebas se creó un nuevo documento de NC utilizando como modelo una clase de documento y pedido de ventas de otra sociedad que si funciona, así como su control de copias, y tampoco funcionó.

Se agradecen sus comentarios.
